roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/MO138572:17012722/X:RESTITUTION OR OTHER CONDITIONS TRANSFERRED TO 17012722 PURSUANT TO HARVEY/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING TERMINATED/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:02-04-19)/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & STATUS OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/DOP/
